subject: WM-0182 review: verified
body: Repair-1 independently verified at a17ae56. Original High 1 is closed: readActiveClaimsInto emits zero amounts for ENTITY/CELL/INTERACTION_SPOT, preserves record amounts only for ITEM_QUANTITY/CAPACITY, and the all-five-channel regression is exactly [0,0,2,0,3] with existing all-before-any and fourteen-lane coverage passing. Original High 2 is closed: both production roots use auditMethodClosure, whose same traversal now validates declaration owner plus literal-this receiver identity; foreign-class same-name, same-class non-this, and unresolved receiver negatives all run through that formal auditor and fail closed. Repair diff is limited to reservation-ledger.ts/test, closure test, and WM-0182 report; Worker golden/production and task scope are unchanged. Typecheck, 46 focused, 15 Worker, repair-scoped Prettier, boundaries, handoff, taskctl validate/status, diff checks, and full quality 80 files/524 tests passed; only expected taskctl-complete task JSON formatting drift remains outside the committed repair.
